_provenance: EDITORIAL DATA (FIREWALL.md): nothing here is a computed fact about the sport. AMENDED AT T2 SIGN-OFF: accents are national SPORTING-IDENTITY (kit) colors — flag-derived where identity and flag coincide, with explicit per-nation overrides where the footballing identity is iconic and off-flag (Netherlands = Oranje, Italy = azzurro, India = Men-in-Blue). Bands stay flag-derived (kit-pair override for Australia-style green/gold identities). Where a spec color fails WCAG AA on the dark shell, the display accent keeps the hue and is lightened only until it measures. Every pair is verified by validate-nations.ts and re-verified by the core build gate — the build FAILS below AA. This file is the MOCK SUBSET; the authoritative pack tables live in each pack's pipeline/src/theme.ts (85 soccer + 25 cricket nations) with per-entry rationale in docs/TEAM-THEMING-COLORS.md.
_fallback: Any nation absent from a pack's table — or any entry the validator rejects — renders UNTHEMED: the incumbent --team teal, no band, no banner tint. Themed rendering is an allowlist, never a derivation.

England.note: T1-approved treatment kept verbatim: kit white is reserved (indistinguishable from --text); display accent is the lightened St George red.

Brazil.note: Identity == flag: the canary-yellow kit IS the flag yellow (14.7:1 verbatim).

Argentina.note: Identity == flag: the albiceleste celeste passes verbatim (8.1:1).

Germany.note: JUDGMENT: the white/black kit identity is unusable on the dark shell (white = --text, black = --bg) — flag gold carries the usable German identity. Black band stripe gets the inset ring.

spec.source: Oranje — House of Orange sporting identity (off-flag)

Netherlands.note: IDENTITY OVERRIDE (T2 sign-off): Oranje replaces the T1 lightened-cobalt mock. Passes verbatim (7.4:1); the flag tricolor stays as the band.

spec.source: Azzurro (Savoy blue) sporting identity (off-flag); spec base #0066B3

Italy.note: IDENTITY OVERRIDE: the Azzurri blue is nowhere on the tricolor flag. Display accent lightened +28% along the hue to clear the surface-chip pair (4.90 on the banner tint).

spec.source: Men in Blue — ODI kit identity (off-flag); spec base #0A50A1

India.note: IDENTITY OVERRIDE (cricket, cover-drive): India's cricket identity is the ODI blue; the tricolour stays as the band. Rendered on the cricket shell — see docs/a11y-report-assets/final-cricket-india.png.
